prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（理科）最低位次依次为3132→3448→3200→3226→2654，2025年较2024年前移约572名，出现明显前移趋势，近5年整体呈波动中前移态势，2025 年基准约2654名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划：2021年57人、2022年55人、2023年57人、2024年58人、2025年59人，2026年大幅增至104人，较2025年 扩招约76.3%，为近5年最大幅度扩招，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第34名，近年稳定在33–34名区间， 属于全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因实验室爆炸事故（1死3伤）引发校园安全关注；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等 偏高；2021–2025年未见明显投档断档记录，录取稳定性较好；土木工程A+（全国顶尖）、电气工程A-、机械工程A-、环境科学与工程A-、风景园林学A-；电气 工程及其自动化、计算机类等热门专业与优势学科高度关联，对高分考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息 /通信（高热推荐）等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；土木建筑（分化观望）热度下降；甘肃省2026年高考报名总人数约218700人，较2025年（物理类121443+历史类58374≈179817） 增长约21.6%，考生竞争加剧；重庆大学位于重庆市，与甘肃省同属西部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在甘肃省招生占比数 据缺失。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约76.3%以及甘肃省考生总数增长约21.6%三方面因素：扩招幅度远超考生增幅，位次应明显后 移；但2025年位次前移反映学校热度上升，且电气、计算机等王牌专业持续高热，部分抵消扩招效应。预测2026年物理类最低位次约3839名，区间3339–4339名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (Science) were 3132 → 3448 → 3200 → 3226 → 2654. In 2025, the ranking moved forward by approximately 572 places compared to 2024, showing a clear forward trend. Over the past 5 years, the overall trend has been fluctuating but moving forward, with a baseline of about 2654 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu for Physics Category: 57 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 59 in 2025, and a significant increase to 104 in 2026, an expansion of about 76.3% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in the past 5 years, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–34 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident (1 death, 3 injuries) raising campus safety concerns. Douyin popularity ranking 23rd (relatively hot), short video platform exposure moderately high. No obvious admission cutoff gaps from 2021 to 2025, indicating stable admission. Civil Engineering A+ (national top), Electrical Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-. Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, etc., are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) and other engineering majors have consistently high social popularity. Civil Engineering and Architecture (differentiated wait-and-see) popularity is declining. In 2026, the total number of Gansu college entrance exam registrants is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 121,443 + History Category 58,374 ≈ 179,817), intensifying candidate competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, in the same western region as Gansu, with moderate regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend in 2025 rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 76.3% in 2026, and the increase in Gansu candidate total by about 21.6%: the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, so the ranking should clearly move backward. However, the forward ranking in 2025 reflects increased university popularity, and top majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science remain highly popular, partially offsetting the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 3839, with a range of 3339–4339.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.

- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross and Environmental-Chemical Health)
- Architecture
- Engineering Experimental Class (Economics and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 3839, with a range of 3339–4339. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (3339) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors like Electrical Information and Computer Science. Candidates near the predicted ranking are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors like Mathematics and Physics Foundation and Excellence Program. Candidates near the upper limit (4339) can consider Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering and Environmental-Chemical Health as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for History Category (Liberal Arts) were 496 → 460 → 471 → 432 → 463. Over the past 5 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 430–500 range, with a baseline of approximately 463 in 2025, showing an overall stable trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu Province: 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and increasing to 8 in 2026, a 100% expansion compared to 2025, the largest in the past 5 years, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–34 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns. Douyin popularity ranking 23rd (relatively hot), with moderately high exposure on short video platforms. No record of admission cut-off gaps from 2021 to 2025, indicating good admission stability.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Civil Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, etc., are mainly engineering disciplines. The History Category enrollment majors (Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, Chinese Language and Literature, English) have low correlation with these advantage disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, in the same western region as Gansu Province, with moderate regional preference. History Category enrollment majors are Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism), Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class), and English. Law has social popularity recommendation, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, English is generally wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition among candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering three factors: the 2025 ranking of 463, the doubling of the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (4 to 8 students), and the approximately 21.6% increase in total candidates in Gansu Province: the 100% expansion far exceeds the candidate growth rate, so the ranking should significantly drop. However, the popularity of History Category majors is stable, and the university's overall level is high with a stable reputation, partially offsetting the expansion effect. It is predicted that the lowest ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 721, with a range of 613–829.
